modules.name: GJFFI Ω
modules.mission: Assign functions across jurisdictions and identify funding, fiscal, regulatory and infrastructure routes.

modules.name: Entity Formation Mission
modules.mission: Create only the entities justified by the accepted architecture.

modules.name: Talent & Employment Mission
modules.mission: Choose among employment, EOR, contractor, branch, subsidiary, secondment and partner routes.

modules.name: Capital Formation Mission
modules.mission: Sequence customer cash, credits, grants, debt, equity, strategic capital and project finance.

modules.name: Public-Support Mission
modules.mission: Build a lawful, auditable support portfolio with stacking and cash-timing controls.

modules.name: Capability & IP Mission
modules.mission: Determine creation, ownership, rights, invocation, transfer, valuation and Chronicle admission.

modules.name: Procurement & Vendor Mission
modules.mission: Procure the launch stack under requirements, security, rights, cost and evidence controls.

modules.name: Infrastructure Deployment Mission
modules.mission: Turn demand into site, energy, compute, permits, finance, commissioning and output.

modules.name: Market-Entry Mission
modules.mission: Prove demand through the least irreversible viable route.

modules.name: Global / Sovereign Expansion Office
modules.mission: Keep the institution current after launch and generate evidence-tested successors.
